brand.name: Saldo
brand.vibe: Calm, clear, premium minimalism. Notion meets Nubank.

primary.description: Emerald/Sage green. Used for CTAs, positive numbers, and brand identity.

background.description: Off-white for light mode, deep charcoal for dark mode.

typography.rules: Avoid Inter or Roboto for headings. Use negative tracking (tracking-tight) for large headings to give a premium feel. Left-align most text for readability.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing. Extreme simplicity. If it's not essential, remove it. Emphasize negative space.
spacing_and_layout.card_style: rounded-2xl border border-[#E2E8F0] dark:border-[#2D3748] bg-white dark:bg-[#131C18] p-5 shadow-sm
spacing_and_layout.hero_section: py-8 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2

buttons.base: rounded-xl font-semibold py-4 px-6 active:scale-95 transition-transform flex items-center justify-center

components.fab: absolute bottom-6 right-6 h-16 w-16 rounded-full bg-[#059669] flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg active:scale-90
components.input: rounded-xl border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-800 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-[#0A0F0D] px-4 py-4 text-base focus:border-[#059669] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#059669]
components.smart_alert_banner: rounded-xl p-4 bg-gray-100 dark:bg-gray-800 flex flex-row items-center gap-3
components.chips: rounded-full px-4 py-2 bg-gray-100 dark:bg-gray-800 text-sm font-medium border border-transparent active:border-[#059669]

motion.interaction: Snappy micro-interactions. Modals and bottom sheets should slide up with subtle spring physics.
motion.list_transitions: Fade and slide in for new expenses.

user_avatar.description: Default minimalist user avatar for the profile settings

testing.rules: All interactive elements MUST include a `testID` (for React Native) attribute with kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., `login-submit-button`, `fab-add-expense`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Project is a React Native Expo app with file-based routing (Expo Router).
Use NativeWind for Tailwind styling. Convert the tailwind classes provided above into className props.
Core philosophy: The user must understand their financial status in <10s. Keep the UI devoid of complex spreadsheet-like tables on the Home screen.
Home screen must have a massive HERO text showing the remaining month balance.
Use 'cards modernos' with 1px borders and very light shadow for data points (Daily average, Projection, Daily limit).
Implement the FAB (Floating Action Button) for quick expense adding. It should trigger a modal/sheet with amount, category chips, and description.
The Smart Alerts banner should be prominent on the Home screen with a friendly tone ('Você está dentro do planejado').
Load 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' fonts via expo-font. If not possible, use system fonts (sans-serif) as fallback.
Ensure both Light and Dark themes are supported via NativeWind's dark mode classes (`dark:bg-...`).
Do NOT use bright generic blue; strictly follow the sage/emerald green palette for brand moments.
